Build a No-Code Agent Operating System (Mission Control for Your AI Agents)

The episode shows how to build a non-technical “agent operating system” that acts as a mission control for multiple AI agents and workflows (SEO, video, text-to-speech, images) using tools like Claude, Hermes Agent, and open-source projects such as OpenJarvis. The presenter demonstrates plugging a CLI-based agent into a cleaner UI with features like a Kanban board, shared skills, optional memory via Obsidian, and local model support via Ollama, noting it can run locally or on a VPS. They outline a repeatable “loop method”: find an agent, ask Claude for a build recipe and downsides, order it to build (with bypass permissions), and verify it works—troubleshooting with screenshots if needed—highlighting that installation can take minutes (about six) and can be rolled back.

Free AI SEO with Google NotebookLM: 5 Ways to Rank on Google + ChatGPT (Blogs, Videos, Images & Podcasts)

The script explains how to use Google’s free NotebookLM as an “AI SEO machine” to rank in Google and AI search engines by turning one topic and keyword into multiple assets. It shows results from sites that grew from near zero to 206 clicks/day and from zero to 76 clicks/day using these methods. The step-by-step process includes auditing gaps in existing content, creating an SEO-optimized blog post inside NotebookLM, generating videos (including cinematic overviews) that can rank, producing infographics that rank in image search, creating audio overviews as podcast-style content that can also improve time-on-page when embedded, and making multiple unique blog posts targeting the same topic. It also mentions linking content together, answering FAQs, and a paid “AI Profit Boardroom” setup with an agent operating system and coaching.

videos.title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month! This month in AI was packed with strange and important updates. Google is testing Remy, a new Gemini agent that many are already calling a possible OpenClaw killer. Elon Musk showed more of Grok 5, Anthropic’s Mythos 1 keeps appearing in cybersecurity traces, DeepSeek cut prices again, and Boston Dynamics upgraded Atlas into a much stronger humanoid robot. But the biggest story may be the rise of AI agents that can work, code, see, adapt, and possibly spread much faster than people expected.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

0:00 Intro
1:54 Google Remy
12:21 New Atlas Robot
21:22 Unitree G1
25:23 Evolvable AI

1:10:55 Anthropic Mythos 1
1:25:06 Grok 5

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than another normal month of AI news. Google, Elon Musk, DeepSeek, Anthropic, OpenAI, and major robotics companies are all moving toward the same thing: AI systems that do more than answer questions. Remy is pushing Gemini deeper into real work, Antigravity 2.0 is changing coding, Grok 5 could turn xAI into a serious coding player, DeepSeek is making powerful AI cheaper again, and Mythos may be pushing AI agents into cybersecurity. At the same time, humanoid robots like Atlas and Unitree G1 are becoming stronger, more useful, and easier to control.

videos.title: THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE HEADING BACK TO THE STANLEY CUP FINAL!!
videos.summary_source_text:
THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE HEADING BACK TO THE STANLEY CUP FINAL!! The Carolina Hurricanes are heading back to the Stanley Cup Final for the first time since 2006! They defeated the Montreal Canadiens 6-1 in Game 5 to punch their ticket for the first time in 20 years! What stood out in the win, and what does it mean for the team, franchise, and everyone? On the Eastern Conference Final Saturday Special Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes absolutely DOMINATED the Canadiens again, winning 6-1 en route to their first Stanley Cup Final since 2006. Between the Junkyard Dog line, Frederik Andersen, and a total team effort, the Hurricanes were destined to get over the hump and make it to the ultimate dance. Second and finally, Zach shares his thoughts on what it means not only for the team, but for Hurricanes fans as they will see their team have a chance for their second Stanley Cup in franchise history. What has transpired over the last eight seasons, more so the last 20 years, to get to this point? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: How Vegas Swept the Presidents' Trophy Avalanche | 2026 WCF Rewind
videos.summary_source_text:
How Vegas Swept the Presidents' Trophy Avalanche | 2026 WCF Rewind In this edition of Series Rewind, relive every defining moment from the Western Conference Final between the Vegas Golden Knights and Colorado Avalanche. The Presidents' Trophy-winning Avalanche appeared poised for a championship run, but Vegas found another gear behind Mitch Marner, Pavel Dorofeyev, Jack Eichel, Mark Stone and Carter Hart.

The series featured dramatic third-period comebacks, Dorofeyev's goal-scoring surge, Stone's emotional return from injury, and one of the most remarkable turnarounds of the postseason when Vegas erased a 3-0 deficit in Game 3 before completing the comeback victory.

From Carter Hart's clutch saves to Ivan Barbashev's Game 2 heroics and Stone's series-clinching breakaway goal, this mini-movie captures every major moment from a Western Conference Final that sent Vegas back to the Stanley Cup Final.

videos.title: Put THIS Under Your Feet Before Bed Tonight | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Put THIS Under Your Feet Before Bed Tonight | Dr. Mandell Before bed tonight, try something surprisingly simple that may help relax your feet, legs, breathing, and nervous system using nothing more than a frozen water bottle. In this video, Dr. Mandell demonstrates how slowly rolling one bare foot over a frozen bottle for about 90 seconds may help stimulate sensory nerves, release tension in the plantar fascia, improve circulation, and support parasympathetic nervous system activation, the calming “rest and recovery” state your body needs before sleep. Many people are physically exhausted at night, yet their nervous system remains overstimulated from stress, screen time, anxiety, overthinking, poor posture, standing all day, or constant fight or flight activation. This simple before bed technique combines cold stimulation, slow pressure, fascia release, sensory nerve input, and calming breathwork to help the body unwind naturally. One of the most fascinating parts of this technique is comparing one foot to the other before switching sides, because many people immediately notice one side feeling lighter, looser, calmer, cooler, or more relaxed. Watch the full video, try it for yourself tonight, and comment below describing exactly what you felt after doing it. Your experience may help someone else struggling with stress, tension, poor sleep, tight feet, restless legs, or nervous system overload.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. Start with both feet together on the alignment stick, flare the left foot, then step the right foot out farther than feels natural. This creates the wider base you need for a stronger launch angle, better balance, and more consistent contact. A more stable, athletic stance often means more distance without swinging harder.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. videos.title: Lär hellre barnen om pengar än att ge dem pengar
videos.summary_source_text:
Lär hellre barnen om pengar än att ge dem pengar Det finns en myt att man måste ge sina barn pengar på 18-årsdagen för att vara en bra förälder. Jag tänker tvärtom: det är helt okej att inte ge något, och att ge ekonomisk kompetens är mycket mer värt än själva slanten.

Nästan oavsett hur mycket du ger vid 18 är det smulor jämfört med vad barnet tjänar över livet och med ränta-på-ränta på det de själva sparar. Den vanliga frågan är när barnen är redo att prata pengar. Min erfarenhet är att de nästan alltid är redo, frågan är när vi vuxna är det.

Mer om barn och pengar finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden. Everything is sourced, and every leak is labeled as a leak. We dig into xAI's Colossus supercomputer, the 200K-GPU build, the multi-model training strategy, the early-2026 window, and the $2-per-million pricing rumor that could undercut OpenAI — then ask whether the AGI talk actually holds up.
If you want the honest picture instead of the hype reel, start here.

videos.title: The Dahlin Mechanic Even Makar Doesn’t Replicate
videos.summary_source_text:
The Dahlin Mechanic Even Makar Doesn’t Replicate There's something Rasmus Dahlin does that even Cale Makar and Quinn Hughes don't really use the same way. Makar is famous for his 10-and-2’s, where his hips rotate open and he releases off the inside hip almost instantly. That's world class footwork mechanics, and it's part of Dahlin's mechanical advantage.

But Dahlin is doing something different at the blue line when he is quarterbacking the powerplay. He gets into that same internally rotated position, with his toes turned inwards and the puck cocked back behind him, and instead of releasing, he holds it. 

He holds it long enough for F1 to turn his toecaps and lose his angle on his push down the wall. Dahlin's stance forces the penaltykiller out of position. The reason most players never use this position is that it feels uncomfortable. It looks like you have no power, no balance, and nowhere to go. But that's exactly the illusion, because your body is actually coiled, the puck is loaded behind you, and your skates are pointed in the direction you're about to attack. 

The defender sees the loaded puck and the rotated hips and assumes you're about to make a play to one side, when in reality your line of travel is the opposite direction. 

This is why we lean so hard on shared language at Train 2.0. The moment you can call something "internal hip rotation" and pair it with what it looks like in a Dahlin clip, you can actually access the movement. Without the language, the mechanic stays invisible to you, even when you're watching it happen ten times a game. 

If you want to start working on this and the rest of the foundation, the free Downhill Skating training is the right place to begin. It's the same system we use to compare your video to elite NHLers and coach you into their mechanics. 

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 3 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol Day three highlights from Austria where Sepp Straka, Andrew 'Beef' Johnston and Kota Kaneko battled for the lead.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues this week as the DP World Tour heads to a new venue for the Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol. Ryder Cup hero Sepp Straka will tee it up on home soil for the first time since 2018, leading a host of Austrian stars looking to delight the home fans. Since that appearance at the Shot Clock Masters, Straka has gone on to become the first Austrian to win on the PGA TOUR, taking his tally of wins on that circuit to four and twice win the Ryder Cup but he is searching for a maiden DP World Tour title. This week we head to a third first-time host in five events as Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith becomes the 465th venue to stage a DP World Tour event. Joining the field this week are players like Casey Jarvis, Kipp Popert and reigning champion Nicolai von Dellingshausen.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Most Golfers Ignore This… And It Ruins Their Ball Striking
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Golfers Ignore This… And It Ruins Their Ball Striking If you want to know how to strike irons consistently, how to hit driver straight and how to hit the golf ball further with every club in your bag — this is the golf lesson you need to watch first.

Most golfers searching for how to improve their ball striking focus on swing mechanics, positions and tips. But there is one fundamental that affects every single shot you hit — with your irons, driver, fairway woods, hybrids and even your chip shots. Get this right and you'll strike irons better, hit driver further and stop hitting fat and thin shots almost immediately. Ignore it — which most golfers do — and no tip, drill or lesson will ever fully fix your ball striking.

In this golf lesson I want to show you exactly what I showed my student Allan this week. He came to me still struggling to hit irons consistently and couldn't hit driver straight despite working hard on his game. Once we fixed this one thing — with two simple setup checks and the prop drill — his contact transformed, his distance increased and his accuracy improved. All in a single session. Trackman confirmed his low point moved to 3.1 inches after the golf ball consistently.

⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this golf lesson in one free download right here: https://www.dannymaude.com/the-one-thing-that-can-instantly-improve-your-ball-striking

What you'll learn in this golf lesson:
▶ How to strike irons consistently — the one fundamental most golfers ignore
▶ How to hit driver straight by controlling where your club bottoms out
▶ How to stop hitting fat shots and thin shots with the same simple fix
▶ How to hit driver further and improve iron distance without swinging harder
▶ The two setup checks that immediately improve how you strike irons and driver
▶ How to use the prop drill to hit driver straight and strike irons pure
▶ Why fixing this one thing also helps you hit driver longer and fix your slice

⏱️ CHAPTERS
0:00 — Why you can't strike irons consistently no matter what you try
1:04 — How to hit driver straight and strike irons better — the one fix
1:36 — How controlling your low point helps you hit driver further and straighter

2:48 — How to stop hitting fat shots — Allan's setup fix
3:12 — How to strike irons consistently — setup check 1: belt buckle position
4:02 — How to hit irons pure — setup check 2: lead ankle and shoulder alignment
4:49 — The most common mistake when trying to hit irons consistently

videos.title: Penguins Loading Up? Avalanche Changes? | David Pagnotta Insider Update
videos.summary_source_text:
Penguins Loading Up? Avalanche Changes? | David Pagnotta Insider Update The Colorado Avalanche are out of the playoffs after a shocking sweep at the hands of the Vegas Golden Knights, and now the pressure is building heading into a massive offseason. David Pagnotta joins Daily Faceoff Live to discuss whether major changes could be coming in Colorado, including speculation surrounding Jared Bednar’s future behind the bench and what the Avalanche may look to change this summer.

We also dive into the Pittsburgh Penguins’ offseason plans after Evgeni Malkin confirmed he’s returning for another season. With significant cap space available, could Kyle Dubas try to make one last push around Sidney Crosby and Malkin?

Plus, the latest NHL trade rumors involving Mason McTavish and the Anaheim Ducks, why teams continue to monitor Brady Tkachuk’s future in Ottawa, and whether this summer could finally bring another NHL offer sheet.

David Pagnotta breaks down all the latest NHL news, trade buzz, and offseason storylines from around the league.

videos.title: Rotate Better With This Feel #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Rotate Better With This Feel #golfswing #golftips A lot of golfers fight an over-the-top move without realizing the real issue starts at the top of the backswing. When the shoulders flatten and the club gets laid off, the only way down is to steepen the path, throw the clubhead, and stall the body - this leads to disaster.  In this video, we show you how adjusting the shoulder plane creates space for the arms, keeps the club on plane, and allows you to rotate through the strike instead of trying to rescue it. This drill will help you find more consistent contact and better distance.

videos.title: The #1 Mistake that You Are Making with Supplements
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Mistake that You Are Making with Supplements Are your supplements actually working? Discover the most common supplement mistakes, plus how to maximize supplement absorption, the importance of supplement timing, why RDAs may not be enough, and more. Stop wasting money on supplements that aren’t delivering the benefits you’re looking for!

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4u2QzAI

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: Common vitamin mistakes 
0:23 RDA vs. therapeutic dosage 
1:20 Vitamin D3 dosage
3:06 Vitamin B1 benefits
4:22 Magnesium supplements
5:28 Zinc supplements
7:40 Selenium supplements 
8:34 Diet and supplement absorption
9:13 How to take vitamins with their cofactors
11:12 Coenzyme Q10
14:12 Supplement timing
16:12 Natural vs. synthetic vitamins
18:45 Form of vitamins

Watch next for more common supplement mistakes to avoid and how to get the most out of your vitamins and minerals:
▶️ https://youtu.be/nNofJ4xT-ME
▶️ https://youtu.be/MwZ63SFmkPE
▶️ https://youtu.be/gdJDzdJjXXM

👉 Make choosing supplements easier with this free guide: https://drbrg.co/3RThiT0

Try this simple test to uncover hidden maltodextrin in your supplements here:
▶️ https://youtu.be/4p3SqQn9izs

The information on a supplement label doesn’t always tell the whole story. The RDA does not always equal the amount needed to correct a deficiency or produce therapeutic benefits. It’s often the bare minimum needed to prevent severe deficiency. Many people aren’t taking enough of key nutrients to see meaningful results.

People often rely on supplements to solve health problems without making dietary changes. A healthy diet is essential for proper supplement absorption and maximizing benefits.

Cofactors are nutrients that work together in biochemical reactions throughout the body. If you’re not taking vitamins with their cofactors, it could be one reason your supplements aren’t working. In nature, vitamins don’t exist in isolation, they come in complexes with other supporting nutrients.

Timing also matters. Some supplements are best taken in the morning, while others may be more beneficial before bed.

The source of a supplement is important as well. While certain synthetic compounds, such as benfotiamine and TUDCA, can be beneficial, many nutrients are best obtained from naturally sourced supplements. It’s also important to avoid unnecessary fillers like maltodextrin.

The form of a vitamin or mineral can significantly affect absorption. For example, many magnesium supplements contain magnesium oxide, which is poorly absorbed and can be hard on the digestive system. Magnesium glycinate is a better choice for absorption and overall effectiveness.

Dr. Eric Berg, DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

▶️ https://youtu.be/nNofJ4xT-ME

Try this simple test to uncover hidden maltodextrin in your supplements here:
▶️ https://youtu.be/4p3SqQn9izs

The information on a supplement label doesn’t always tell the whole story. The RDA does not always equal the amount needed to correct a deficiency or produce therapeutic benefits. It’s often the bare minimum needed to prevent severe deficiency. Many people aren’t taking enough of key nutrients to see meaningful results.

People often rely on supplements to solve health problems without making dietary changes. A healthy diet is essential for proper supplement absorption and maximizing benefits.

Cofactors are nutrients that work together in biochemical reactions throughout the body. If you’re not taking vitamins with their cofactors, it could be one reason your supplements aren’t working. In nature, vitamins don’t exist in isolation, they come in complexes with other supporting nutrients.

Timing also matters. Some supplements are best taken in the morning, while others may be more beneficial before bed.

The source of a supplement is important as well. While certain synthetic compounds, such as benfotiamine and TUDCA, can be beneficial, many nutrients are best obtained from naturally sourced supplements. It’s also important to avoid unnecessary fillers like maltodextrin.

The form of a vitamin or mineral can significantly affect absorption. For example, many magnesium supplements contain magnesium oxide, which is poorly absorbed and can be hard on the digestive system. Magnesium glycinate is a better choice for absorption and overall effectiveness.

videos.title: Can Ferrari beat the FASTEST LAMBO EVER? DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Can Ferrari beat the FASTEST LAMBO EVER? DRAG RACE It’s time for the all-new Lamborghini Temerario to go up against the Ferrari 296 in a drag race, rolling race & brake test! 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-3005

We’ve got our hands on Lamborghini’s Huracan replacement, and it’s going up against one of its key rivals - the Ferrari 296! The question is, will the three motors in the Lamborghini prove it’s just too powerful for the Ferrari to keep up? 

Let’s take a closer look at the stats…

The Temerario is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, coupled with three electric motors. Combined, they produce an almighty 920hp and 730Nm, and it tips the scales at 1,790kg. As new, it costs £259,567.

As for the 296, it’s powered by a 3-litre twin-turbo V6 coupled with an electric motor. The two combine to produce 830hp and 740Nm, with this power sent to the rear wheels only! It weighs in at 1,558kg, and as new, it costs £259,575. 

So how will this one play out - will the Temerario run away to victory? Or could the Ferrari snatch it? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to everyone who helped set-up this race: 
https://www.instagram.com/affluent_time/
https://www.instagram.com/joseph_sewell_/

videos.title: Hindi | 29th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 29th May, Friday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Stop Early Arm Rotation #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Early Arm Rotation #golfswing #golftips If your arms move independently in the backswing, you’ll lose sequence, get narrow, and struggle with consistent strikes.
This split-grip drill helps you feel how the torso and arms work together — keeping the right arm on top, creating width, and engaging your body from the start.
You’ll eliminate early arm rotation, improve synchronization, and set up a smoother downswing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If your arms move independently in the backswing, you’ll lose sequence, get narrow, and struggle with consistent strikes.

videos.title: The Reason Sugar Makes You Hungrier
videos.summary_source_text:
The Reason Sugar Makes You Hungrier A sugar spike doesn't end when blood sugar comes down. Insulin can remain elevated for hours afterward, driving blood sugar lower and leaving people feeling hungry, shaky, irritable, and ready to reach for another snack. This creates a cycle where the body is constantly chasing the next source of energy. Over time, repeated spikes and elevated insulin can contribute to insulin resistance and metabolic dysfunction.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 2 of the 2026 Charles Schwab Challenge, featuring Jordan Smith, Hideki Matsuyama, Michael Thorbjornsen, and A.J. Ewart, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to historic Colonial Country Club for the 80th edition of the Charles Schwab Challenge, with plenty on the line as players make one final push toward the next Signature Event and the upcoming U.S. Open. The field is loaded with stars and rising names, headlined by Ludvig Åberg, who arrives in Texas after a T4 finish at the PGA Championship and six top-10 finishes in his last seven starts. Defending champion Ben Griffin returns looking to become the first player since Ben Hogan in the 1950s to successfully defend at Colonial. Other notable names in the field include Justin Thomas, Hideki Matsuyama, Rickie Fowler, Keegan Bradley and Gary Woodland, while Alex Smalley looks to continue his red-hot form after a runner-up finish at the PGA Championship. Max Homa is one of the golfers in the field chasing a spot in the U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in just three weeks' time. Homa needs a victory in one of the next three PGA TOUR events to secure his place in the field. The race for the next Signature Event, the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday, also concludes this week. Players are battling for spots via the Aon Swing 5 and Aon Next 10 standings, with strong finishes at Colonial carrying major FedExCup implications. The iconic par-70 layout at Colonial Country Club continues to reward precision and shot-making following its Gil Hanse-led restoration, while the famed “Horrible Horseshoe” remains one of the toughest stretches on TOUR.

videos.title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem Claude Opus 4.8 just arrived, and on paper, Anthropic should be celebrating. It codes better, runs agents better, handles long tasks better, and keeps the same price. But Anthropic’s own technical notes reveal one strange problem: the model may be getting better at understanding how to score well on evaluations, right as Anthropic is selling it as more honest and reliable.

👉 Start creating with Flova here: https://www.flova.ai/?refCode=EQZQ923K

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Claude Opus 4.8’s official launch, same pricing, and major coding/agent upgrades
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-8
Anthropic’s claim that Opus 4.8 is around 4x less likely to miss flaws in its own code
SOURCE: https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/939094/anthropic-claude-4-8-opus-honesty-effort
Claude Code’s new Dynamic Workflows feature for running hundreds of parallel subagents
SOURCE: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/28/anthropic-releases-opus-4-8-with-new-dynamic-workflow-tool/
The upcoming Claude Mythos model and how Opus 4.8 compares to Anthropic’s next tier
SOURCE: https://www.axios.com/2026/05/28/anthropic-opus-release-mythos
Anthropic’s $65 billion funding round and reported $965 billion valuation
SOURCE: https://www.businessinsider.com/anthropic-surpasses-openai-with-965b-valuation-debuts-opus-4-8-2026-5
Opus 4.8’s “honesty” narrative, effort control, and dynamic workflow launch
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/business/anthropic-roll-out-claude-mythos-coming-weeks-launches-opus-48-2026-05-28/

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than another Claude update. Opus 4.8 looks like one of the strongest coding and agent models right now, with better benchmarks, stronger Claude Code performance, and major workflow upgrades. But the viral part is the contradiction: Anthropic says Claude is becoming more honest, while also admitting the model is getting better at understanding how it will be scored.

videos.title: Better Grip Code = Better Hands
videos.summary_source_text:
Better Grip Code = Better Hands The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Do The Canadiens Still Have A Chance? | Real Kyper & Bourne
videos.summary_source_text:
Do The Canadiens Still Have A Chance? | Real Kyper & Bourne Nick Kypreos, Justin Bourne, and Sam McKee check in on the latest news regarding the Toronto Maple Leafs' head coaching search. Then, former NHL president, GM, and head coach Doug MacLean joins for his weekly appearance to share his thoughts on the Carolina Hurricanes' performance in the Eastern Conference Final and what's been wrong with Montreal. 

----------------------------------------------

0:00 - Stream Start
7:02 - Doug MacLean

videos.title: Remembering Claude Lemieux + Hurricanes Have Montreal on the Brink | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Remembering Claude Lemieux + Hurricanes Have Montreal on the Brink | DFO Rundown In Episode 470 of The Rundown, Jason Gregor and Mike Rupp begin with a heartfelt conversation about the life and legacy of Claude Lemieux following his passing at the age of 60. The discussion goes beyond hockey, touching on mental health, life after professional sports, the challenges many men face after retirement, and why these conversations matter.

The guys then shift to the Stanley Cup Playoffs, where the Montreal Canadiens are facing elimination against the Carolina Hurricanes. What has gone wrong for Montreal, why has Carolina been so dominant, and is there any path back into the series for the Canadiens? Jason and Mike break down the matchup and what Montreal must change to extend its season.

They also discuss the Vegas Golden Knights' impressive sweep of the Colorado Avalanche, why Vegas may be the most complete team remaining, and what a potential Stanley Cup Final matchup between the Golden Knights and Hurricanes could look like.

Plus, Fill in the Blank with Pat Puff, surprising teams for next season, the future of the Golden Knights behind the bench, and which players the crew would most like to see lift the Stanley Cup this year.

If you or someone you know is struggling, please reach out to a trusted friend, family member, mental health professional, or local crisis support service.

videos.title: Fix Your Impact Position  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix Your Impact Position  #golfswing #golftips Many golfers think they should return the club to the ball the same way they set up — but impact is a completely different position. At impact the hands should be slightly ahead, the hips more open, and the weight shifted into the lead side. In this video, we show you how to build and feel the correct impact position before you swing, then add a small backswing to train that movement into your strike. This simple drill will help you create better compression and more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Many golfers think they should return the club to the ball the same way they set up — but impact is a completely different position. videos.title: Därför rekommenderar storbanken sina dyra fonder (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Därför rekommenderar storbanken sina dyra fonder (2026) Det största problemet i finansbranschen är incitamenten. Som Charlie Munger lär ha sagt: visa mig incitamenten, så visar jag dig utfallet. Storbanken tjänar olika mycket beroende på vilket val du gör som kund, så deras råd kan aldrig vara helt opartiskt.

Ta en fond med 1,4 procent i avgift mot en med 0,2 procent. Forskningen säger att du ska välja den billiga, men på den tjänar banken sju gånger mindre. Finansinspektionen, statens egen myndighet, har i rapporter visat att storbankskunder får sämre avkastning, dyrare fonder och fler av bankens egna fonder.

Mitt råd: lyssna på dina egna myndigheter. Mer om fonder och sparande finns på rikatillsammans.se och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

The Dallas Mavericks have the 9th pick in the upcoming NBA Draft. What’s the best-case scenario when it rolls around to them at No. 9? The DLLS Mavs crew follows their fun Friday tradition of doing a mock draft, live on YouTube. Plus, our latest thoughts from the playoffs and a look at Joshua Jefferson, an Iowa State forward with connective playmaking ability who might be on the board when the Mavs pick at No. 30.

videos.title: Hurricanes vs Canadiens Game 5 Preview & NHL Rumours ft. David Pagnotta | The Sheet with Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Hurricanes vs Canadiens Game 5 Preview & NHL Rumours ft. David Pagnotta | The Sheet with Jeff Marek Jeff Marek and David Pagnotta break down a pivotal Game 5 between the Carolina Hurricanes and Montreal Canadiens as the Hurricanes look to close out the Eastern Conference Final and punch their ticket to the Stanley Cup Final. With Carolina holding a commanding 3-1 series lead after a dominant Game 4 performance, Jeff and David analyze what the Canadiens must do to extend their season, whether Montreal can generate enough offense to solve Frederik Andersen, and why the Hurricanes have controlled the series from start to finish. They also dive into the latest NHL coaching and management news, including the growing speculation surrounding Jay Woodcroft, Bruce Cassidy's future, and what could be next for several teams heading into a busy offseason. Plus, the guys react to Kelly McCrimmon's appearance on OverDrive and discuss his comments about the Vegas Golden Knights, roster construction, and the organization's continued pursuit of championships. To wrap things up, Jeff throws out a wild offseason trade scenario involving the Vancouver Canucks that sparks plenty of debate about what could be one of the biggest moves of the summer.

Subscribe to Daily Faceoff for more NHL analysis, breaking news, trade rumours, playoff coverage, and interviews with hockey's biggest names.

videos.title: Picking the Denver Broncos' 2026 NFL games against the spread... over/under 10.5 wins?
videos.summary_source_text:
Picking the Denver Broncos' 2026 NFL games against the spread... over/under 10.5 wins? Sean Payton and the Denver Broncos are favored in 10 games in the 2026 NFL season. But they are only favored in one game in their first six games as they are underdogs to the Kansas City Chiefs, the Los Angeles Rams, San Francisco 49ers, the Los Angeles Chargers and the Seattle Seahawks.How many of those games will the Broncos win? After the first six games, they are favored in their next eight games. Will the Broncos and Bo Nix win more than 10.5 games this season?

videos.title: My Best Advice To Stop AI From Taking Your Job
videos.summary_source_text:
My Best Advice To Stop AI From Taking Your Job If you want to prevent AI from taking your job in the future, these are my top 3 pieces of advice:

1. Fall in love with learning. It’s one of the most common trait amongst successful people. 2. Build stuff. Companies don't just want book smarts anymore, they want people who can build in the real world. Yes, build with AI, but also understanding how things actually work too.
3. Get good at talking to people. This will be the ultimate competitive advantage in an AI world. A lot of people will lose their social skills from spending too much time online and connecting with bots and people through a screen. Don’t be one of them.

videos.title: ChatGPT vs Grok: The Real AGI Race Nobody Is Talking About (Claude & Gemini Too)
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT vs Grok: The Real AGI Race Nobody Is Talking About (Claude & Gemini Too) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's debating which chatbot is better. But the real question is: which AI lab actually builds AGI first — and does it even matter how they get there?
In this video, I break down all four frontier labs — OpenAI (GPT-5), xAI (Grok-4), Anthropic (Claude Opus 4.5), and Google (Gemini 3) — across the things that actually decide the race: safety philosophy, architecture, compute infrastructure, funding, and deployment strategy. Then I give you my honest probability breakdown on who reaches AGI first.
Spoiler: the answer is not as obvious as you think.
What's covered:

What's covered:

00:00 — The question everyone's getting wrong
01:19 — Safety philosophies: Constitutional AI vs RLHF vs stress testing
04:35 — Architecture breakdown: MoE, context windows, benchmark leaders
07:02 — Compute & training data: who has the real infrastructure advantage
09:16 — Funding & deployment: money, reach, and strategy
11:33 — AGI race odds: my honest lab-by-lab breakdown
14:01 — The 3 trade-offs that actually separate these labs

Whether you're team GPT, team Grok, or quietly rooting for Claude — this breakdown will change how you think about the AI race.

videos.summary_source_text:
Just ONE Easy Drill to Fix This Common Swing Fault Now there's one very simple move that you can do to finally stop standing up out of your posture in the downswing. It actually has to do with your shirt buttons, believe it or not. You see, when I stand up out of my posture, my hips go in toward the golf ball. My spine straightens up and my shirt buttons actually get farther away from the golf ball. See how using this shirt button trick can your get your dynamic loft #'s down to pro-level numbers...

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol Round 2 Highlights

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues this week as the DP World Tour heads to a new venue for the Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol. Ryder Cup hero Sepp Straka will tee it up on home soil for the first time since 2018, leading a host of Austrian stars looking to delight the home fans. Since that appearance at the Shot Clock Masters, Straka has gone on to become the first Austrian to win on the PGA TOUR, taking his tally of wins on that circuit to four and twice win the Ryder Cup but he is searching for a maiden DP World Tour title. This week we head to a third first-time host in five events as Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith becomes the 465th venue to stage a DP World Tour event. Joining the field this week are players like Casey Jarvis, Kipp Popert and reigning champion Nicolai von Dellingshausen.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

I Let Claude AI Opus 4.8 Trade For Me | Here's What Happened 🚀 I Let Claude Opus 4.8 Trade For Me… Here's What Happened

💬COMMENT "CLAUDE AI" to get the workbook and prompts.

Last week, Claude was closing my trades while I sat with a coffee.

Yesterday, Anthropic dropped Claude Opus 4.8 — so I decided to test it properly.

Not with theory. Not with hype. Not with fake screenshots.

I wanted to know three things:

1. Can Claude Opus 4.8 build a profitable TradingView strategy?
2. Can it use tools to backtest and improve that strategy?
3. Can it actually scan the market and place real trades — live, with real money?

So I gave Claude access to my AI trading tools, my TradingView workflow, and my free Trader Dev MCP server. Then I let it build strategies, backtest them, optimize them, and take real trades on camera.

Some of it worked better than I expected. Some of it didn't. I'm showing you all of it.

videos.summary_source_text:
Canadiens Facing Elimination + Blue Jackets Offseason Preview | Daily Faceoff Live The Montreal Canadiens are facing elimination as the Carolina Hurricanes hold a commanding series lead in the Eastern Conference Final. We break down what Montreal needs to do to keep their season alive, whether there’s a path back into the series, and if the Hurricanes are simply proving to be too much for the young Canadiens.

We also dive into another edition of Fill in the Blank, including which NHL team should be most aggressive in pursuing Mason McTavish if the Anaheim Ducks are willing to listen, and Kelly McCrimmon’s comments about the Bruce Cassidy situation and the leak that shook the hockey world.

From there, we continue our offseason preview series with a look at the Columbus Blue Jackets. What should be the organization's top priority this summer? What would a dream offseason look like as Columbus tries to take the next step toward becoming a playoff contender?

Steven Ellis joins the show for The Next Wave as we break down his latest Top 100 NHL Draft rankings, discuss some of the biggest risers and fallers, and highlight prospects that hockey fans should be paying attention to ahead of the draft.

videos.title: Conn Smythe & Five-In-Five | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Conn Smythe & Five-In-Five | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 Episode 137 of Morning Cuppa Hockey is LIVE with your host Jonny Lazarus and former NHL defenceman Colby Cohen!

Legendary play-by-play voice Kenny Albert stops by to break down where the Carolina Hurricanes and Montréal Canadiens series stands and what we can expect as this Eastern Conference Final pushes deeper into the playoffs. 

Then Jesse Montano joins to do what nobody wants to do but everybody needs to hear... a full Colorado Avalanche post mortem. The number one seed in the West, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar... gone in four. What went wrong and where does this team go from here?

Mike McMahon rounds out the show with a deep dive into college hockey.

videos.title: The Perfect Storm Hit Montreal | 32 Thoughts
videos.summary_source_text:
The Perfect Storm Hit Montreal | 32 Thoughts On this edition of 32 Thoughts, Kyle Bukauskas and Elliotte Friedman unpack the surgical play of the Carolina Hurricanes as they push the Montreal Canadiens to the brink of elimination.
They also pay tribute to Claude Lemieux following his sudden passing. 

---------------------------------------------- 

0:00 - Show start - Paying tribute to Claude Lemieux
4:40 - The guys unpack the surgical play of the Carolina Hurricanes as they push the Montreal Canadiens to the brink of elimination
25:00 - A league memo regarding trades between now and the lead up to free agency
32:16 - The NHL Draft Combine in Buffalo
34:16 - The Vancouver Canucks and Manny Malhotra
35:52 - Jay Woodcroft and the Toronto Maple Leafs
39:44 - The Bruce Cassidy saga in Vegas
45:32 - The Thought Line

---------------------------------------------- 

Email the podcast at 32thoughts@sportsnet.ca or call the Thought Line at 1-833-311-3232 and leave us a voicemail.

videos.title: My Exact Claude Code Setup Still Allowed After Ban
videos.summary_source_text:
My Exact Claude Code Setup Still Allowed After Ban 🛡️ Grab the full source + join Creator Magic Premium → https://mrc.fm/premium
(use code TANK for your first 3 months at a discount)

I built my own mission control for Claude Code and it's the one setup that's still allowed after the bans and billing chaos this year.

I can spin up as many agents as I want, each one sandboxed, and watch every single one work live in the browser. It runs entirely on my own server. No GitHub, I use Forgejo for self hosted git. Nothing leaves the building except the calls to Anthropic.

In this video I show you exactly how it works, why it's on the right side of Anthropic's terms (April's cutoff, and the June 15 programmatic credit change), and then I get the dashboard to build itself a brand new feature on camera - flattening a whole repo into one text file. I also run live deep research with sub agents, drag and drop screenshots into Claude Code, and merge real pull requests into my own self hosted git.

A quick, honest heads-up: every agent runs with permissions skipped, because I like to live dangerously. It's powerful and a little bit dangerous, so run it isolated, locked down, and never as root.

The full source is in my premium community as a snapshot, as is, with no support - bring your own Claude (Max, Pro, whatever you're on).

📦 Get it here → https://mrc.fm/premium (code TANK)

🔗 The terms, if you want to read them yourself:
- Anthropic legal & compliance: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/legal-and-compliance
- The June 15 programmatic-credit announcement: https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2054610152817619388

If you want me to keep building features on this - or if it's just a fun toy I'm enjoying this week - let me know in the comments and I'll do a follow up.

If this saved you from the great Claude subscription panic of 2026 throw a like!

videos.title: Can the Denver Nuggets find a different second star next to Nikola Jokić? | Serbian Corner
videos.summary_source_text:
Can the Denver Nuggets find a different second star next to Nikola Jokić? | Serbian Corner While the NBA audience waits to see whether the OKC Thunder or the San Antonio Spurs will play the New York Knicks in the Finals, Miroslav continues with his post-postseason shows.

In the 192nd episode of the show,  he is joined by Sam Esfandiari of the Light Years Podcast, Iztok Franko of the Digginbasketball substack, and DNVR's own Brendan Vogt to discuss the current state of the Nuggets, Lakers, and Warriors. Topics include:

• What can the Nuggets learn from the 2019 Warriors, who lost the championship and Kevin Durant, but found a way to win another title in 2022?
• What can the Lakers learn from the 2024-2026 Nuggets when it comes to building a team around Luka Dončić?
• Lessons the Nuggets should learn from around the League
• The best path for second and third-tier contenders during the heyday of two young juggernauts in the West
• Expectations versus wishful thinking when it comes to the Nuggets' moves this summer
• Fun (?) trades between the three teams

Support the show: https://Patreon.com/MiroslavCuk

In this video, Rick Shiels takes on Soyul Kang in an 18-hole matchplay at Asiad Country Club in Busan, South Korea. Asiad Country Club is a world-class championship course and the host of LIV Golf Korea. Can Rick Shiels use his experience to get the win, or will the young pro make a statement over 18 holes?

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to Soyul here:

videos.title: Why Am I Always Cold, Tired, and Gaining Weight? (It's Your Thyroid — Fix It in 30 Days)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Am I Always Cold, Tired, and Gaining Weight? (It's Your Thyroid — Fix It in 30 Days) Discover 7 key signs of a slow thyroid and learn how to distinguish between Hashimoto’s and general hypothyroidism. Plus, discover natural ways to support thyroid health and address common thyroid problems naturally. 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4u012gg

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Find a doctor trained in the Dr. Coimbra Protocol here: 
https://www.hsctstopsms.com/simple-overview-of-coimbra-vitamin-d-protocol/list-of-coimbra-protocol-doctors-worldwide/ 

Watch Dr. Coimbra's full Interview here:
▶️ https://youtu.be/cmPEA0EWd7g

Keep watching to learn more about the root cause of hypothyroidism and the best ways to support a healthy thyroid naturally:
▶️ https://youtu.be/zIBEVeBDCNo
▶️ https://youtu.be/3ykJdD-W_n8


0:00 Introduction: 7 slow thyroid symptoms 
1:17 Depression and hypothyroidism 
3:38 Slow thyroid temperature test
3:59 Thyroid-stimulating hormone
5:15 Tips for slow thyroid support
5:47 Hashimoto’s hypothyroidism
6:14 Hashimoto’s remedies
7:29 More slow thyroid tips
8:08 Liver health and thyroid health
8:37 What causes a slow thyroid?

Here are 7 common symptoms of hypothyroidism you may not have realized are related to your thyroid.  

1. Thinning eyebrows
2. High cholesterol
3. Puffy face
4. Carpal tunnel syndrome
5. Depression or anxiety
6. Headaches
7. Low body temperature

A slow thyroid is often diagnosed using only thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) levels, but many people may be diagnosed incorrectly when a full thyroid panel isn’t performed.

If you have a slow thyroid, there are several natural ways to support thyroid health and improve symptoms.

A complete thyroid panel should include T3, T4, TSH, and thyroid antibodies, not just thyroid-stimulating hormone levels alone.

If thyroid antibodies are present, it’s most likely a case of Hashimoto’s hypothyroidism. If antibodies are not present, it usually indicates a general hypothyroid condition.

Selenium is important for both types of hypothyroidism and plays a key role in thyroid function. If you have a slow thyroid, it’s also important to check iodine levels before increasing iodine intake. Iodine may be beneficial in some cases, but too much can worsen thyroid problems.

DATA:
https://pms.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6047889/

videos.title: What Would Happen If You Did Intermittent Fasting for 14 Days?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Would Happen If You Did Intermittent Fasting for 14 Days? What would happen if you did intermittent fasting for 14 days straight? The results may surprise you.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4eIv1FP

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, I’ll explain what happens to your body day by day as you shift from burning sugar to burning fat. You’ll learn why many people lose excess water weight quickly, reduce bloating, improve brain fog, and start burning dangerous visceral fat around the organs.

As insulin levels come down, your body becomes more efficient at using fat and ketones for fuel. By week two, many people notice less hunger, better focus, improved mood, reduced inflammation, and more energy.

I’ll also explain how intermittent fasting supports your mitochondria, metabolism, fat burning, and overall health.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

• Bryson DeChambeau

• Good Good

• Bob Does Sports

• Grant Horvat

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: ONE MORE! Carolina Hurricanes Eyeing Chance to Clinch Stanley Cup Final Berth in Game 5
videos.summary_source_text:
ONE MORE! Carolina Hurricanes Eyeing Chance to Clinch Stanley Cup Final Berth in Game 5 The Carolina Hurricanes are on the brink of making the Stanley Cup Final for the first time in 20 years. Heading into Game 5, they have a 3-1 series lead in the Eastern Conference Final for their first chance to advance to the ultimate dance since 2006. That said, what do they need to do to accomplish something that's been a long road since that fateful night in 2006? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes need to replicate what they've been doing since Game 2, especially with how they locked down the Canadiens in Game 4. They will have to fight off a desperate Canadiens team with their own. If they want to end the series in five games, they'll need to be urgent, calm, and collected as they have been to punch their ticket to the next round. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the keys to the game and what he hopes to see from the Hurricanes in Game 5. Who is he keeping an eye on in this game to be the hero? Finally, Zach concludes the show by picking his Canes to Click. Who will score in Game 5 for the Hurricanes? He also shares his thoughts on how massive Game 5 is for the Hurricanes. Being able to accomplish something they've been working on for the last few seasons is right there. While it's not the ultimate prize, this hurdle will give them the confidence for what waits next. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 28th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 28th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

videos.title: Canes Take 3-1 Stranglehold, The Odds Of A Superstar Getting Moved & David Pagnotta Joins | DFO Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Canes Take 3-1 Stranglehold, The Odds Of A Superstar Getting Moved & David Pagnotta Joins | DFO Live The Carolina Hurricanes are now one win away from the Stanley Cup Final after taking both games in Montreal and grabbing a commanding 3-1 series lead over the Canadiens. Tyler and the crew break down what’s gone wrong for the Habs, whether there’s still any hope left in the series, and why Carolina continues to look like the most complete team remaining in the playoffs.

We also play Fill In The Blank with some of the NHL’s biggest offseason storylines, including the future of Jason Robertson in Dallas, Connor Hellebuyck in Winnipeg, and whether Jared Bednar could actually be on the hot seat in Colorado.

Then it’s time for an offseason preview focused on the New York Islanders. What should priority number one be this summer, and what would a dream offseason look like for the Isles as they try to get back into contention?

David Pagnotta joins for the Insider Notebook to discuss what could be a franchise-changing offseason for the Avalanche, what direction the Pittsburgh Penguins could take with Evgeni Malkin, and other major NHL storylines developing around the league.

videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 28th May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

videos.title: Is Cale Makar's Injury Worse Than Expected? Which Free Agents Could Return? RIP Claude Lemieux
videos.summary_source_text:
Is Cale Makar's Injury Worse Than Expected? Which Free Agents Could Return? RIP Claude Lemieux Colorado Avalanche fans brace for uncertainty as star defenseman Cale Makar’s injury sparks questions about his availability for the new 84-game NHL season. Could a prolonged absence derail the Avs’ quest for another Stanley Cup? Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson weigh insider reports, recent injury trends, and what Makar’s timeline might mean for Colorado’s fast-approaching campaign.

RFA and UFA debates heat up as the Avalanche eye critical roster decisions. Will Jack Drury and Zakhar Bardakov return, and should veterans like Brett Kulak and Brent Burns get new deals? The hosts analyze financial strategies, potential replacements, and the impact of aging on the Avalanche blue line. The episode closes with a heartfelt remembrance of Claude Lemieux and his role in shaping one of hockey’s greatest rivalries. Don’t miss this essential offseason breakdown for Avs diehards.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 1 of the 2026 Charles Schwab Challenge, featuring Lee Hodges, Ryan Gerard, Tom Kim and Brandt Snedeker, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to historic Colonial Country Club for the 80th edition of the Charles Schwab Challenge, with plenty on the line as players make one final push toward the next Signature Event and the upcoming U.S. Open. The field is loaded with stars and rising names, headlined by Ludvig Åberg, who arrives in Texas after a T4 finish at the PGA Championship and six top-10 finishes in his last seven starts. Defending champion Ben Griffin returns looking to become the first player since Ben Hogan in the 1950s to successfully defend at Colonial. Other notable names in the field include Justin Thomas, Hideki Matsuyama, Rickie Fowler, Keegan Bradley and Gary Woodland, while Alex Smalley looks to continue his red-hot form after a runner-up finish at the PGA Championship. Max Homa is one of the golfers in the field chasing a spot in the U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in just three weeks' time. Homa needs a victory in one of the next three PGA TOUR events to secure his place in the field. The race for the next Signature Event, the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday, also concludes this week. Players are battling for spots via the Aon Swing 5 and Aon Next 10 standings, with strong finishes at Colonial carrying major FedExCup implications. The iconic par-70 layout at Colonial Country Club continues to reward precision and shot-making following its Gil Hanse-led restoration, while the famed “Horrible Horseshoe” remains one of the toughest stretches on TOUR.

videos.summary_source_text:
Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb Google DeepMind’s Demis Hassabis says humanity may already be standing in the foothills of the singularity. AI agents are now coding, researching, planning, paying, helping with science, and cutting real work from days to minutes. The big question is no longer whether AI is perfect. It’s whether imperfect AI has already become useful enough to speed up everything around it.

videos.title: How to Not Lose The Puck
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Not Lose The Puck The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating.

videos.title: Baldy on if Broncos are REAL Super Bowl Contenders, How the NFL Views Bo Nix & More
videos.summary_source_text:
Baldy on if Broncos are REAL Super Bowl Contenders, How the NFL Views Bo Nix & More NFL analyst Brian Baldinger joins the DNVR Broncos Podcast to break down whether the Denver Broncos are real Super Bowl contenders, how the rest of the NFL views Bo Nix, and what Denver must improve to take the next step in 2026. Hear Baldy’s thoughts on Sean Payton’s roster, the Broncos’ offensive line, Bo Nix’s national respect level, and why Patrick Mahomes is still the AFC quarterback every defense fears most. If you’re looking for the latest Broncos analysis, Bo Nix expectations, and Super Bowl talk, this episode is packed with must-hear insight for Denver Broncos fans.

videos.title: LIVE FITTING! Full Bag , This Kid Can Play!
videos.summary_source_text:
LIVE FITTING! Full Bag , This Kid Can Play! HOW GREAT IS THIS. This visit made my step into this world absolutely worth it! Father & son combo at The Trott Shop for a LIVE fitting.

Dave is a friend I met on my travels on the PGA Tour & over the years we’ve stayed in contact and today he visits The Trott Shop with his son Carlo.

As Carlo’s graduation present and before he heads to Clemson we’re going to check his club set up and ensure he’s dialed. A good fitting example of someone who moves well. Shallower player, spin is their friend.

Take note how I tackle this fitting with a loft change, a shaft adjustment and softer tips in the woods.

Thank you so much for the support from the boys heading over, club fitting is such a personal journey & I’m honored to have played a role in both of your golf bags.

The Trott Shop has your specs and is here for you! To learn more about my tour experience come and experience all this for yourself at The Trott shop. Head to La Valle Coastal Club which is the new home for my own tour fitting experience THE TROTT SHOP:

https://thetrott.shop

At The Trott Shop we can go through the fitting process and check that your new clubs are not just perfect for your game but also match the other sticks in your set.

https://pages.thetrott.shop/tour-fitting-experience-booking-price

As always #comment with any questions and be sure to hit #subscibe for more equipment vids. 

The Trott Shop is my brand new academy that brings the tour experience to you the consumer. This venue will open in May and I can’t wait to see you there.

videos.title: The Claude 5 Leak Everyone Got Wrong (1M Context, 82% SWE-Bench?)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Claude 5 Leak Everyone Got Wrong (1M Context, 82% SWE-Bench?) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone thought the Claude 5 "Fennec" leak meant Sonnet 5 was about to drop with a 1 million token context window and a record 82% SWE-Bench score. They got it wrong. In this video I break down exactly what the leaked Vertex AI logs actually revealed, what shipped instead, and where a real Claude 5 actually stands right now.

Here's the short version: the "Fennec" codename was real, but it launched as Claude Sonnet 4.6 — not Sonnet 5 — at around 79.6% SWE-Bench, the same $3/$15 pricing, and the 1M context window in beta. The leaked 82.1% SWE-Bench number was never officially confirmed by Anthropic. And a true Claude 5? Prediction markets point to Q2–Q3 2026, with nothing official yet.

We cover the full leak timeline, the claude-sonnet-5@20260203 model ID, what the leak got right (context window, price tier) versus wrong (the name, the headline benchmark), how it compares to Opus 4.7, and what to actually watch for before the real Claude 5 lands.

If you've seen the "82% SWE-Bench" number floating around and want the real story — this is it.

videos.title: It’s NOT Salt Raising Your Blood Pressure | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
It’s NOT Salt Raising Your Blood Pressure | Dr. Mandell What if the thing quietly raising your blood pressure isn’t just the salt shaker on your table, but the hidden preservatives inside packaged foods you eat every day? In this video, we break down new research involving more than 112,000 adults showing that certain food preservatives commonly found in deli meats, canned soups, packaged breads, frozen meals, sauces, snack foods, and even “healthy” products may be linked to higher blood pressure and cardiovascular disease. You’ll learn how these additives may affect the endothelium, nitric oxide production, oxidative stress, inflammation, vascular stiffness, and even the gut microbiome. This is not about fear. It’s about awareness. Once you understand what’s hiding on ingredient labels, you may never look at packaged foods the same way again.

STUDIES / REFERENCES:

Hasenböhler A, Touvier M, et al. Preservative Food Additives and Risk of Cardiovascular Disease and Hypertension. European Heart Journal. 2026.

NutriNet Santé Cohort Study involving more than 112,000 adults followed for approximately 8 years. INSERM, Université Sorbonne Paris Nord, France.

Monteiro CA, Cannon G, Levy RB, et al. Ultra processed foods: what they are and how to identify them. Public Health Nutr. 2019. PMID: 30744710.

Vanhoutte PM, Shimokawa H, Feletou M, Tang EH. Endothelial dysfunction and vascular disease. Acta Physiol (Oxf). 2017. PMID: 27187006.

Förstermann U, Sessa WC. Nitric oxide synthases: regulation and function. Eur Heart J. 2012. PMID: 21890489.

Tang WH, Kitai T, Hazen SL. Gut microbiota in cardiovascular health and disease. Circ Res. 2017. PMID: 28104796.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Ge med varm hand: därför kommer arvet ofta för sent (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Ge med varm hand: därför kommer arvet ofta för sent (2026) I Sverige får vi ofta barn mellan 20 och 35 år och lever tills vi är runt 85. Det betyder att det normala arvet betalas ut när barnen redan är omkring 60. Men nyttan av pengar minskar med åldern, så pengarna gör mindre skillnad just då.

Mitt resonemang i klippet: planerar du ändå att ge ett arv, ge hellre en mindre summa tidigt, med varm hand, än allt sent med en kall. En mindre summa vid 35 kan betyda mer än en större vid 60. Och vill du hellre leva upp pengarna själv är det helt okej också.

Mer om arv och pengar och livet finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

Mitt resonemang i klippet: planerar du ändå att ge ett arv, ge hellre en mindre summa tidigt, med varm hand, än allt sent med en kall. En mindre summa vid 35 kan betyda mer än en större vid 60. Och vill du hellre leva upp pengarna själv är det helt okej också.

Mer om arv och pengar och livet finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

videos.title: Benefits of Fasting for High Blood Pressure
videos.summary_source_text:
Benefits of Fasting for High Blood Pressure Many people think insulin resistance only happens in those who are overweight, but that is not always true. Constant eating throughout the day keeps insulin elevated and never gives the body a chance to reset. Over time, the body becomes less responsive, which can contribute to high blood pressure and metabolic problems. Creating longer gaps between meals may help restore the body’s natural balance.
