videos.title: Arm Workout at Gold’s Gym Venice (ATHLEAN X | Andrew Huberman)
videos.summary_source_text:
Arm Workout at Gold’s Gym Venice (ATHLEAN X | Andrew Huberman) If you want bigger arms, you can’t just curl and press your way through random biceps and triceps exercises and hope that more effort eventually turns into more growth. In this arm workout, Jeff Cavaliere takes Dr. Andrew Huberman through a science-based biceps and triceps workout that shows you how to get more out of every rep by paying attention to the details that most people overlook.

Build Bigger Arms Here - https://athleanx.com
Subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

When it comes to building bigger biceps, most people think about elbow flexion and stop there. The problem is, the biceps don’t just bend the elbow. They also supinate the forearm and assist in shoulder flexion. That means if you want to train the biceps more completely, you need to choose exercises and perform them in a way that allows you to take advantage of these functions.

That starts with the alternating dumbbell curl. This is one of the most common biceps exercises, but also one of the easiest to underuse. Instead of simply curling the dumbbell up and down, Jeff shows Dr. Huberman how to overload supination by holding the dumbbells with an offset grip. This helps create a stronger biceps contraction and prevents the movement from becoming just another arm swing. From there, a small lift of the shoulder at the top of the curl can help tap into the shoulder flexion function of the biceps, giving you a more complete contraction without turning the exercise into a cheat curl.

Next is the preacher curl, but not the way most people do it. The seated preacher curl often locks you into one fixed position, which can make it harder to adjust your body and arm angle when the exercise starts to get difficult. By doing the preacher curl in a way that allows you to manipulate leverage on the pad, you can drive your elbows into the pad and keep tension where it belongs. This not only helps you get more out of the exercise, but also helps protect the biceps tendon from unnecessary strain.

The incline dumbbell curl is another staple for building bigger biceps, especially because it places the long head of the biceps on stretch. That stretch position is important because it allows you to load the muscle in a lengthened state, one of the most valuable positions for hypertrophy. Jeff shows Dr. Huberman how to take this even further with a mechanical dropset. Once you reach failure in the strict incline curl position, you can adjust the execution to continue the set and train not just to failure, but through failure.

Of course, no complete arm workout is complete without direct triceps training. The triceps make up the majority of the upper arm, and if you want bigger arms, you need to train all three heads of the triceps with special attention to the long head. Since the long head crosses the shoulder joint, your shoulder and elbow position matter a lot more than most people realize.

That is where the incline powerbomb comes in. By performing this triceps exercise on an incline, you place the long head of the triceps on stretch and create a much better opportunity for growth. But the key is not just the angle of the bench. Jeff highlights the importance of elbow and shoulder positioning so that you promote external rotation rather than falling into internal rotation. This allows for a greater range of motion, a safer shoulder position, and a stronger contraction through the triceps.

From there, Jeff takes Dr. Huberman through the bench dip, but with important corrections. Bench dips get criticized often because they can irritate the shoulders when done poorly. The problem isn’t always the exercise itself, but the setup. By turning the hands out, you promote external rotation and reduce irritation to the anterior shoulder capsule. Then, instead of simply pressing straight up, Jeff cues the movement as pressing up and back. This helps create a better contraction in the long head of the triceps and turns the bench dip into a much more effective arm-building exercise.

For the rest of the workout and tips, be sure to watch to the end of the video.

If you are looking for a complete arm workout that helps you build bigger biceps, bigger triceps, and stronger, healthier arms, this is the kind of training you want to pay attention to. Whether you are following along with Dr. Andrew Huberman or applying these tips to your own workouts, the details shown in this video can help you get more growth out of the exercises you are already doing.

For a complete step-by-step training program that helps you build muscle, burn fat, and train like an athlete, head to https://athleanx.com and find the program that best matches your goals.

Be sure to subscribe to ATHLEAN-X for more science-based workouts, biceps exercises, triceps exercises, arm workouts, muscle building tips, and training breakdowns from Jeff Cavaliere. ► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues this week as the DP World Tour heads to a new venue for the Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol. Ryder Cup hero Sepp Straka will tee it up on home soil for the first time since 2018, leading a host of Austrian stars looking to delight the home fans. Since that appearance at the Shot Clock Masters, Straka has gone on to become the first Austrian to win on the PGA TOUR, taking his tally of wins on that circuit to four and twice win the Ryder Cup but he is searching for a maiden DP World Tour title. This week we head to a third first-time host in five events as Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith becomes the 465th venue to stage a DP World Tour event. Joining the field this week are players like Casey Jarvis, Kipp Popert and reigning champion Nicolai von Dellingshausen.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: The New Bunker Technique Making Amateurs Look Like Tour Pros
videos.summary_source_text:
The New Bunker Technique Making Amateurs Look Like Tour Pros Most golfers still play bunker shots using an old technique… open stance, cut across the ball, and hope for the best.

But more and more tour players are now using a much simpler and more modern approach to bunker play — standing more square and swinging more square through the sand.

In this video, inspired by comments from Matt Fitzpatrick and Shane Lowry, I’ll show you why this modern bunker technique can make bunker shots easier, more consistent, and far more predictable for amateur golfers.

We’ll cover:

• Why the old bunker method can cause problems
• The modern square setup tour players are using
• How to improve strike and consistency from the sand
• Why this technique is often easier for amateur golfers
• Simple drills and feels to help you improve quickly

If bunker shots have always felt difficult or inconsistent, this might completely change the way you play them.

If you enjoy the video, subscribe for more simple, modern golf instruction designed to help you play better and enjoy the game more.

videos.title: Can This Ball REPLACE The Pro V1...
videos.summary_source_text:
Can This Ball REPLACE The Pro V1... Can a challenger brand really compete with the king of golf balls? In this video, Guy puts the Seed Golf Ball up against the benchmark: the Titleist Pro V1. From driver distance and iron control to greenside spin and feel, this is an honest, no-nonsense test to find out whether Seed is a genuine premium alternative… or just hype.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Micro SaaS: One Problem, One Simple Tool
videos.summary_source_text:
Micro SaaS: One Problem, One Simple Tool Vertical Micro SaaS focuses on solving one specific problem for one type of customer.

Instead of building large platforms, you:

Target one niche and workflow
Solve a single expensive annoyance
Improve outcomes like bookings, follow-ups, or conversions
Build simple tools that integrate into existing systems
Monetize through monthly subscriptions

You don’t need millions of users — just a small group of businesses willing to pay for a real solution.

#MicroSaaS #StartupIdeas #AIAutomation #SoloFounder #SaaS #BusinessIdeas #Entrepreneurship
____________________

The content shared in this video is for educational and informational purposes only, based on personal experience, research, and opinion. It is not intended as legal, financial, business, or professional advice. I am not a licensed attorney, CPA, or financial advisor. Always do your own due diligence before making decisions related to business, income, or investments.
Any tools, platforms, or services mentioned may include affiliate links and may change over time. Please confirm availability, pricing, or features directly with the provider. Use official APIs and follow each platform’s Terms of Service. Obtain consent before messaging or recording, and comply with applicable laws (e.g., GDPR, CAN-SPAM, TCPA, and local rules).
Results and outcomes discussed are not guaranteed and may vary depending on individual effort, context, and external factors. We make no guarantees regarding your specific execution speed, ability to implement these strategies, or any financial results. • How these same golf drills scale directly to driver so you build one repeatable motion across every club

Eric Cogorno draws on 20 years of coaching experience to break down the single most common cause of inconsistent iron play: an unstable axis swing. Whether you're learning how to play golf or rebuilding a swing you've had for years, the Swing Coach AI app is featured throughout as a real-time feedback tool to confirm spine position and catch the errors feel alone can miss.

videos.title: Eat This Daily to Clean Out Your Arteries
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat This Daily to Clean Out Your Arteries Eat this every single day to help prevent clogged arteries and support heart health. Focus on heart attack prevention by addressing the real cause of artery plaque buildup in the first place.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4nUoavv

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: How to reverse plaque naturally
0:28 Hard plaque vs. soft plaque
1:51 Endothelial health explained 
3:00 HDL and LDL cholesterol 
6:29 Small-dense LDL cholesterol
7:22 Statin side effects
9:22 Aged black garlic extract for artery plaque
10:50 More ways to support heart health 
11:13 Fish oil and cod liver oil

Watch these next for more ways to support a healthy heart:
▶️ https://youtu.be/fqwrf0RvOVI
▶️ https://youtu.be/qRrfwUHx99M
▶️ https://youtu.be/W9qSb6--XfE

The standard "clogged pipe" model of heart disease is missing the real root cause: inflammation and insulin resistance. If you want to protect your arteries from the inside out, stop treating the symptoms and start changing your environment.

✅ Step 1: Protect the Artery Lining (Boost Nitric Oxide)
 • Exercise Daily: The physical force of blood flow is the strongest natural trigger for nitric oxide production.
 • Eat Nitrate-Rich Foods: Beets, arugula, and dark leafy greens help your body naturally produce protective gases for your blood vessels.
 • Get Daily Sunlight: UVB rays help convert nutrients stored in your skin directly into nitric oxide.
 • Consider Amino Acids: L-citrulline and L-arginine are the natural building blocks your body uses to keep arteries flexible.

✅ Step 2: Stop the Damage (Lower Fasting Insulin)
 • Intermittent Fasting: One of the most documented ways to rapidly lower fasting insulin and reduce inflammation in the blood vessels.
 • Eliminate Seed Oils & Refined Carbs: These are the primary drivers of insulin resistance and the main culprits that cause your cholesterol to oxidize and rust.

✅ Step 3: Key Artery Supplements
 • Vitamin K2 (MK-7 form): Acts like a traffic cop, sweeping calcium out of your arteries and directing it into your bones where it belongs.
 • Magnesium: An absolute requirement for healthy blood vessel function. A deficiency is directly linked to stiff, calcified arteries.

✅ Step 4: The Tests Your Doctor SHOULD Be Ordering 
Stop relying only on Total Cholesterol. Ask your doctor for these advanced markers:
 • hs-CRP: Measures the actual inflammation in your blood vessels.
 • Fasting Insulin: The best early-warning sign of metabolic damage.
 • ApoB: A more accurate predictor of cardiovascular risk than a standard LDL test.
 • TG-to-HDL Ratio: Divide your Triglycerides by your HDL. This is a simple, highly accurate marker of insulin resistance and dangerous "Small Dense LDL."

DATA:
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3957229/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

• Some of the world’s best golf courses

• Amazing golf courses

• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: ROAD DOMINATION! Carolina Hurricanes are One Win Away from Stanley Cup Final After 4-0 Win in Game 4
videos.summary_source_text:
ROAD DOMINATION! Carolina Hurricanes are One Win Away from Stanley Cup Final After 4-0 Win in Game 4 The Carolina Hurricanes are one win away from reaching the Stanley Cup Final for the first time since 2006. They utterly dominated the Montreal Canadiens in Game 4, shutting them out 4-0. From puck drop, it was all Hurricanes as they controlled all facets of the game. That being said, what stood out in the win? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes imposed their will on the Canadiens, shutting them down to only 18 shots all game, while having 19 shots alone in the third period. Furthermore, instead of needing three goals throughout the game, they only needed three in three minutes in the first period. How clutch were those goals? Secondly. Frederik Andersen showed why the Hurricanes have been going to him for the whole postseason. He picked his fifth playoff shutout for the Hurricanes in his career, third all playoffs. Plus, he is now 11-1 in the playoffs and shows no signs of slowing down. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes will need to keep their emotions in check for Game 5 on Friday. They are one win away from the Stanley Cup Final; they'll need to lock in to win the most important game up to this point in the playoffs. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Toyota Land Cruiser OFF-ROAD BATTLE!
videos.summary_source_text:
Toyota Land Cruiser OFF-ROAD BATTLE! We’ve got our hands on a Toyota Land Cruiser 70, Land Cruiser 80, and an FJ Cruiser, and they’re going head-to-head through a series of off-road challenges! 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-28-05

There’s no denying that the Land Cruiser is one of the best off-roaders you can buy. However, with so many varieties available to buy, which is the best when it comes to going off-road? 

Well, to find out, we’ve got our hands on three varieties. We’ve got the FJ Cruiser with its lightweight chassis (based on the same platform as the 150 Prado), the heavy-duty Land Cruiser 70 with its large load bed, and the station-wagon Land Cruiser 80. 

In terms of performance, the three cars are relatively matched. The FJ Cruiser is powered by a 4-litre V6 petrol that puts down 272hp and 380Nm, the Land Cruiser 70 has a 4.5-litre V8 diesel with 255hp and 568Nm, while the Land Cruiser 80 has a 4.2-litre straight-six diesel with 250hp and 600Nm. 

In terms of off-roading capabilities, all three cars have been lifted, are fitted with proper off-road tyres, and have several mods to help them adapt to some of the more extreme challenges on this off-road course. 

But which will come out on top? You’ll need to stick with Mat to see for yourself! We’ve got our hands on a Toyota Land Cruiser 70, Land Cruiser 80, and an FJ Cruiser, and they’re going head-to-head through a series of off-road challenges! 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-28-05

In terms of off-roading capabilities, all three cars have been lifted, are fitted with proper off-road tyres, and have several mods to help them adapt to some of the more extreme challenges on this off-road course. 

But which will come out on top? You’ll need to stick with Mat to see for yourself!

videos.title: Mattia Binotto: ‘Audi Are Serious’ About F1 Success | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Mattia Binotto: ‘Audi Are Serious’ About F1 Success | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast He learned how to win at Ferrari. He believes Audi can become Formula 1 World Championship contenders by 2030. For Mattia Binotto, the first step is raising the ambition of every person in his team. Audi aren’t on the grid to take part. They’re there to win.

The Audi Team Principal tells Tom Clarkson how he plans to turn the former Sauber team into winners. Mattia talks about the pressure and opportunity created by Audi, a brand with an impressive record in other forms of motorsport. He explains the ingredients that made Ferrari the dominant team of the early 2000s and how he aims to apply the same approach to Audi.

Why are drivers Gabriel Bortoleto and Nico Hulkenberg perfect for Audi? Could the team be a destination for a megastar like Max Verstappen? Will Mattia get a tattoo for the team’s first race win? Tom asks Mattia all these questions and more.

#F1 He learned how to win at Ferrari. He believes Audi can become Formula 1 World Championship contenders by 2030. For Mattia Binotto, the first step is raising the ambition of every person in his team. Audi aren’t on the grid to take part. They’re there to win.

The Audi Team Principal tells Tom Clarkson how he plans to turn the former Sauber team into winners. Mattia talks about the pressure and opportunity created by Audi, a brand with an impressive record in other forms of motorsport. He explains the ingredients that made Ferrari the dominant team of the early 2000s and how he aims to apply the same approach to Audi.

Why are drivers Gabriel Bortoleto and Nico Hulkenberg perfect for Audi? Could the team be a destination for a megastar like Max Verstappen? Will Mattia get a tattoo for the team’s first race win? Tom asks Mattia all these questions and more.

Happy International Burger Day! Happy International Burger Day! One month ago we released The World's 25 Best Burgers 2026, and the reception has been unreal. Thanks for joining us on our journey!

Since 2014, Burgerdudes have reviewed over 1,000 restaurants in 65 countries.

✅ It's all about the burgers
✅ No hidden agendas or local bias
✅ All reviews written by our team

Our focus has always been the burgers, not fancy restaurants, trendy addresses or celebrity chefs. All of our content is created by us, as we travel the world in search of the best burgers. And the best ones include everything from intense smash burgers served from food trucks to juicy dry-aged patties at restaurants dedicated to the craft.

See you at the next burger spot!

videos.title: UK | 27th May, Wednesday - Ep.12 - The Truth About Leverage, Liquidations & Trading Collapse
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 27th May, Wednesday - Ep.12 - The Truth About Leverage, Liquidations & Trading Collapse Welcome to Episode 12 of the RIFT “Before You Quit” series — The Collapse Cycle.

In this episode, we go deeper than trading strategies and profits. We uncover the brutal reality behind why most traders eventually lose their capital, not because markets are impossible, but because repeated emotional behaviour compounds against them over time.

Most accounts are not destroyed by one bad trade.

They collapse slowly… then suddenly.

This session explores the dangerous cycle that traps retail traders:
Greed → Overconfidence → Overleveraging → Panic → Revenge Trading → Liquidation.

We break down the mathematics behind capital destruction, the psychology of liquidation events, and why professional systems focus on survivability first while retail traders often chase emotional excitement and fast profits.

Topics covered in Episode 12 include:

• Why most traders eventually blow up their accounts
• The collapse cycle explained step-by-step
• How leverage becomes a destruction accelerator
• Why emotional sizing destroys consistency
• The mathematics of drawdowns and recovery
• Why a 50% loss requires a 100% gain to recover
• The psychology behind liquidation cascades
• How fear spreads faster than information in volatile markets
• Why aggressive trading eventually collapses
• The difference between retail behaviour and institutional structure
• Why professional systems prioritize capital preservation
• How smart money survives long enough to compound
• Why retail traders become liquidity during volatility events
• The role of diversification and structured allocation
• Why survivability matters more than prediction
• The hidden danger of revenge trading
• Why overexposure destroys traders over time
• How institutional systems manage risk differently
• Why emotional participation creates fragility
• The future of structured execution systems

This episode also connects directly into the evolving infrastructure behind RIFT.

We discuss:

• Structured participation environments
• AI-assisted execution systems
• Distributed trading flows
• Multi-layer allocation architecture
• High-frequency execution infrastructure
• The future of copy trading ecosystems
• Intelligent participation systems
• Synchronised execution environments
• Autonomous financial infrastructure

As markets evolve, emotional retail participation is increasingly being replaced by structured execution ecosystems powered by automation, intelligent systems, and infrastructure-driven participation.

The future of trading is not about reacting faster.

It is about surviving longer.

Professional systems understand something retail traders often ignore:

Capital preservation creates longevity.
Longevity creates compounding.
Compounding creates wealth.

This episode is designed to reshape how traders think about leverage, volatility, risk, and survivability inside modern financial markets.

If you are serious about understanding:
• institutional behaviour,
• smart money mechanics,
• emotional market traps,
• AI-driven trading infrastructure,
• and the future of financial participation,

then this episode is essential viewing.

The next evolution of RIFT will focus heavily on:
• High-frequency participation systems
• Copy execution infrastructure
• Strategy synchronization
• Infrastructure-based execution environments
• AI-enhanced trading ecosystems
• Professional-grade participation architecture

Episode 13 Preview:
“The Liquidity Illusion — Why Markets Move Toward Pain Before Opportunity”

Upcoming topics:
• Stop-loss hunting
• Liquidity sweeps
• Institutional entry behaviour
• Market maker mechanics
• False breakouts
• Emotional trap zones
• Copy trading evolution
• High-frequency execution systems
• Why retail traders get shaken out before major moves

Thank you for being part of the RIFT ecosystem and the “Before You Quit” educational journey.

The goal is not just building traders.

videos.title: Hindi | 27th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 27th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: What Lies Ahead This Offseason for the Colorado Avalanche? Big Changes, or Stick With What You Have?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Lies Ahead This Offseason for the Colorado Avalanche? Big Changes, or Stick With What You Have? The Colorado Avalanche face a pivotal offseason: will GM Chris MacFarland and head coach Jared Bednar make bold changes or run it back with the current core? Trade rumors swirl around Valeri Nichushkin, Ross Colton, and Artturi Lehkonen as availability and playoff performance come under scrutiny. Meanwhile, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and Devon Toews remain central to the Avs’ Stanley Cup ambitions.

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect potential roster shakeups, Bednar’s future behind the bench, and whether a coaching change could breathe new life into the team. Will the Avalanche rely on strategic depth moves, or target a top-six shakeup via trade or free agency? Key discussion points include Gabriel Landeskog’s return, Nick Roy’s role, and high-stakes decisions shaping Colorado’s upcoming NHL campaign. Will core changes reignite their Cup pursuit, or is loyalty to the current roster the best path forward?

videos.title: 27.5: Andersen SHUTS OUT Canadiens in Game 4! 🇩🇰🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
27.5: Andersen SHUTS OUT Canadiens in Game 4! 🇩🇰🔥 Frederik Andersen delivers a dominant performance with 18 saves in the Hurricanes 4-0 win in Game 4, earning his 8th career postseason shutout and his 5th with Carolina, a new franchise record. The shutout comes on the road against the Montreal Canadiens as the Carolina Hurricanes take a 3-1 series lead, moving within one win of the Stanley Cup Final.

videos.title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
videos.summary_source_text:
Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5 Grok 5 is starting to look like Elon Musk’s biggest xAI move yet. A massive 1.5 trillion-parameter Grok model has reportedly finished training, and the real shock is the Cursor connection. If xAI really trained it on real developer workflow data, Grok may be learning how professional engineers actually build, debug, and fix software. Now Musk is pushing into the AI coding race with Grok Build, Cursor, and a much bigger model aimed directly at OpenAI, Google, and Claude.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Elon Musk’s reported Grok 5 push and the 1.5 trillion-parameter model
SOURCE: https://eu.36kr.com/en/p/3825954113983367
xAI’s Grok Build coding agent and its move into terminal-based AI programming
SOURCE: https://x.ai/news/grok-build-cli
The official Grok Build beta page and its parallel subagent workflow
SOURCE: https://x.ai/cli
SpaceX’s reported $60 billion option to acquire Cursor
SOURCE: https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2026/apr/21/spacex-cursor-ai-startup
DeepSeek researcher Deli Chen’s AI-written research agent paper
SOURCE: https://victorchen96.github.io/auto_research_survey.pdf
Alibaba Qwen3.7-Max breaking into the top global AI coding race
SOURCE: https://eu.36kr.com/en/p/3826677900055431

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than one new model. Elon Musk is trying to turn Grok into a serious coding AI, using bigger models, real developer data, and agent tools that can work across codebases. At the same time, DeepSeek is showing how AI agents can write full research papers, and Alibaba’s Qwen is suddenly challenging OpenAI, Google, and Claude in coding. The whole AI race is shifting from chatbots into agents that can build, debug, research, and work for hours.

videos.title: The Worst Time to Fix Your Swing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Worst Time to Fix Your Swing #golfswing #golftips We’ve all been there — you hit one bad shot, then try to “fix” it on the next hole… and it only gets worse. The key is to stop correcting mid-round. Go into your game with a plan for how to handle mistakes before you step on the first tee. Accept the miss, reset, and focus on your process instead of chasing perfection.

videos.title: How To Do The Hook Pass
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Do The Hook Pass The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: You Are Destroying Broccoli’s Cancer Fighting Power by Cooking It This Way | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
You Are Destroying Broccoli’s Cancer Fighting Power by Cooking It This Way | Dr. Mandell Most people think broccoli is healthy no matter how you cook it, but preparation can dramatically change its biological benefits. Inside broccoli is a natural compound precursor that can be converted into sulforaphane, one of the most researched plant compounds known for supporting the body’s detoxification enzymes, reducing oxidative stress, calming inflammation, and enhancing important cellular defense pathways that may help lower long term disease risk. But there is a catch. This conversion depends on an enzyme called myrosinase, and excessive heat can significantly reduce its activity. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains how common cooking mistakes may reduce broccoli’s most powerful protective benefits, the best cooking method to preserve more of its health potential, why broccoli sprouts are so remarkably potent, and the fascinating mustard powder trick that may help restore some sulforaphane production even after cooking. We also discuss cruciferous vegetables, thyroid concerns, oxidative stress, and what current research really says about broccoli’s role in long term health and cellular protection. Small changes in how you prepare your food can make a surprisingly big difference.

PubMed References:

Zhang Y, Talalay P, Cho CG, Posner GH. A major inducer of anticarcinogenic protective enzymes from broccoli, isolation and elucidation of structure. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1992. PMID: 1549603

Fahey JW, Zhang Y, Talalay P. Broccoli sprouts, an exceptionally rich source of inducers of enzymes that protect against chemical carcinogens. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1997. PMID: 9144157

Clarke JD, Dashwood RH, Ho E. Multi target prevention of cancer by sulforaphane. Cancer Lett. 2008. PMID: 18308457

Higdon JV, Delage B, Williams DE, Dashwood RH. Cruciferous vegetables and human cancer risk, epidemiologic evidence and mechanistic basis. Pharmacol Res. 2007. PMID: 17317210

*********************************

YouTube:     https://www.youtube.com/user/motivationaldoc 
Facebook:   https://www.facebook.com/motivationaldoc/
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/motivationaldoc/ Most people think broccoli is healthy no matter how you cook it, but preparation can dramatically change its biological benefits. Inside broccoli is a natural compound precursor that can be converted into sulforaphane, one of the most researched plant compounds known for supporting the body’s detoxification enzymes, reducing oxidative stress, calming inflammation, and enhancing important cellular defense pathways that may help lower long term disease risk. But there is a catch. This conversion depends on an enzyme called myrosinase, and excessive heat can significantly reduce its activity. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains how common cooking mistakes may reduce broccoli’s most powerful protective benefits, the best cooking method to preserve more of its health potential, why broccoli sprouts are so remarkably potent, and the fascinating mustard powder trick that may help restore some sulforaphane production even after cooking. We also discuss cruciferous vegetables, thyroid concerns, oxidative stress, and what current research really says about broccoli’s role in long term health and cellular protection. Small changes in how you prepare your food can make a surprisingly big difference.

PubMed References:

Zhang Y, Talalay P, Cho CG, Posner GH. A major inducer of anticarcinogenic protective enzymes from broccoli, isolation and elucidation of structure. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1992. PMID: 1549603

videos.title: A Smarter Way to Tee Off  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
A Smarter Way to Tee Off  #golfswing #golftips Before you tee it up, a little strategy goes a long way. Choose your tee position based on where any trouble is or where the hole is, then step behind the ball to build a clear picture of your target line. This helps you align correctly instead of being influenced by the shape of the tee box. When your aim is clear, your swing has a much better chance to deliver the shot you want.

videos.summary_source_text:
Du behöver inte få cancer för att leva ett rikt liv Många av oss springer på i ekorrhjulet tills något stort händer: sjukdom, förlust, en förälder som går bort. Det är ofta först då vi stannar upp och frågar oss vad som faktiskt är viktigt, och om vi använder vår tid och våra pengar på rätt sätt.

Med stöd i Moa Diseborns tänkande handlar det här klippet om att vi inte behöver vänta på krisen. Vi kan ställa frågorna redan nu: om jag hade två år kvar att leva, vad skulle jag göra med mina dagar? Och sedan låta svaret påverka hur vi lever i dag.

videos.title: Why Silence Has Become Essential
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Silence Has Become Essential Modern life places the body and mind under constant pressure. Processed food, nonstop stimulation, stress, noise, and environmental overload all shape health in ways many people underestimate. Silence is not simply about relaxation, it creates space for the nervous system to recover from a world that rarely slows down. In a world that never stops stimulating the mind, moments of silence may be more important than ever before.

As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Modern life places the body and mind under constant pressure. Processed food, nonstop stimulation, stress, noise, and environmental overload all shape health in ways many people underestimate. Silence is not simply about relaxation, it creates space for the nervous system to recover from a world that rarely slows down. In a world that never stops stimulating the mind, moments of silence may be more important than ever before.

videos.title: The Truth About Grok 5: 10 TRILLION Parameters and AGI
videos.summary_source_text:
The Truth About Grok 5: 10 TRILLION Parameters and AGI Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk says Grok 5 will be "indistinguishable from AGI" — but after digging through every xAI document, leaked roadmap, and Musk interview, the math on that claim doesn't actually add up. In this video, I break down what Grok 5 really is, the insane specs xAI is building toward, and how it stacks up against GPT-4, Claude, and Llama 4.

We cover the Colossus 2 supercomputer (550,000 Blackwell GPUs, 1 gigawatt of power, $1 billion/month in compute), the 6T and 10T parameter Grok 5 variants, xAI's "inherently multimodal" training pipeline using live data from X, Tesla, and SpaceX, and whether any of this gets us closer to real artificial general intelligence — or just a really, really big chatbot.

If you want the honest, hype-free take on Grok 5, AGI, and the future of the AI race, this is for you.

videos.title: Can You Do This Mechanic?
videos.summary_source_text:
Can You Do This Mechanic? What is Soft Drag?
It’s a lateral movement skating mechanic where you twist and tilt your hips, C-cutting with one foot while dragging the toe of your other skate. The drag acts like an “rudder,” letting you cut sharper, change direction instantly, with way less effort.

Why You Need It:
 • Sharper Cuts: The drag + adduction gets you around someone fastest.
 • Elite Deception: Twist those hips, fake one way, turn the toes, go the other.
 • Lateral Movement:Move side-to-side fluidly.

Pro Tips:
1️⃣ Go Wide: Make your base wide for better balance and bigger cuts.
2️⃣ Internal Hip Rotation: Point your knees and toes in, open those hips up.
3️⃣ Soft Ankles & Y-Angle: Stay loose in your ankles, and keep your knees bent in a “Y” shape for max control.
4️⃣ Feel the Toe Drag: Keep the toe of your dragging skate just barely grazing the ice. McDavid, Eichel level if you can adduct.

Want to see it broken down on-ice, step-by-step, with video breakdowns and drills?

videos.title: "Fenix-Saaben" uppstår!
videos.summary_source_text:
"Fenix-Saaben" uppstår! Efterföljaren till den sista generationen Saab 9-3 hade kommit mycket långt, när Saab gick i konkurs. Projekt 540, eller Phoenix,  hade bland annat en ny avancerad bak- och framvagn, ny drivlina och även en elbakaxel på gång.
Anders Johansson och Gabriel Palmenäs (som givetvis jobbade på Saab när det begav sig) driver företaget Griffin Cars, och har köpt upp ett restlager av axlar och motorer för att modernisera befintliga Saab 9-3 bilar.
Men den stora planen är att bygga en liten serie moderna bilar, med äkta Saabteknik! (Det återkommer vi till längre fram)
Det här är del ett i en serie intervjuer med Saab-folk som var med och utvecklade Fenixplattformen, och vi ska givetvis provköra en av de uppdaterade bilarna.
I kommande filmer:
Framvagn: Gunnar Olsson
Bakvagn: Per Janssson
Elbakaxel: Stefan Barbunopulos
Motor: Peter Dahl
Plus provkörning!

videos.title: The RIGHT Way To  Do Face Pulls (Feat. Andrew Huberman)
videos.summary_source_text:
The RIGHT Way To  Do Face Pulls (Feat. Andrew Huberman) The face pull is one of the best exercises you can do for healthier shoulders, better posture, and stronger rear delts — but only if you do it the right way.

While training with my good friend Dr. Andrew Huberman, I got the chance to show him proper form on the face pull. 

That said; most people turn the face pull into a simple pulling exercise and miss the most important part: external rotation. The goal isn’t just to pull the rope toward your face. The goal is to finish in that “biceps flex” position, with your hands wide, thumbs pointing back behind you, and your shoulders rotating outward.

That’s why rope setup matters. If the rope is too short, you won’t have enough room to get your arms out wide enough to reach that true externally rotated position. By using two ropes, you create the width needed to pull back, open up, and actually train the rotator cuff the way the exercise is meant to.

Think of it this way: thumbs toward your belly button equals internal rotation. Thumbs pointing away and behind you equals external rotation. On every rep, pull to face level, open the hands, rotate back, and hold that finish position.

Do the face pull this way and you’ll stop just moving weight — and start building stronger, more resilient shoulders.

For more tips on how to build muscle and strengthen your rotator cuff, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

👉 https://www.instagram.com/athleanx

Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). videos.title: Was Satoshi Even Human?
videos.summary_source_text:
Was Satoshi Even Human? Bitcoin isn't just changing finance, it may be rewriting the rules of belief. In this video, DC breaks down why top academics and Bitcoiners alike use the word ""religion"" to describe the world's most famous cryptocurrency. We look at the messiah myth of Satoshi Nakamoto, the disciples, the prophecies fulfilled, and how the network built actual pilgrimage sites and rituals into its culture. From peer-reviewed papers at Berkeley to the Church of Bitcoin, from Texas billboards to carnivore diets: the parallels aren’t a stretch... They’re uncanny!

Discover why some people treat Bitcoin’s whitepaper as sacred text, why legendary figures like Adam Back, Hal Finney, Nick Szabo, and Michael Saylor map eerily onto archetypal religious roles, and how Satoshi’s vanishing act completed a story arc older than money itself. Don’t miss this deep look at how Bitcoin is reshaping meaning, trust, and hope for millions. Decide where you stand. Watch now!"

videos.title: DO IT AGAIN? The Carolina Hurricanes Looking to Take a 3-1 Series Lead on Wednesday Night
videos.summary_source_text:
DO IT AGAIN? The Carolina Hurricanes Looking to Take a 3-1 Series Lead on Wednesday Night The Carolina Hurricanes are looking to take a 3-1 series lead in the Eastern Conference Final on Wednesday night at the Bell Centre. After winning Game 3 on Monday night in overtime, can they do it again and take both games on the road? What do they need to do to secure the win and be one step closer to the Stanley Cup Final? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes will need to replicate what they did on Monday night in Game 3, but tweak a few things. Can they thwart the Montreal Canadiens again with 12 shots or fewer? Or at least 20 or fewer, and limit the high-danger chances? They'll be looking at the defense to shut it down once again. Secondly, Zach shares who he hopes steps up in Game 4 and leads the way. Who can be that guy to be the hero? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the Canes to Click for a goal scorer in Game 4, and adds more keys to victory for the Hurricanes. videos.title: What Happens When You Finally Start Listening to Your Body
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens When You Finally Start Listening to Your Body Many people spend years trying to fix or correct their body — but very few are taught how to actually listen to it.
When awareness begins to increase, subtle changes often begin to happen. Movement can feel smoother. Breathing can become easier. Confidence can begin to return.  In this video, I explore what often starts to change when people begin reconnecting with their body through awareness.

If this resonates deeply with you and you’d like support in this process, you’re welcome to book a one-on-one Zoom call with me here:
https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min
And if you’d like to explore this work first through direct experience, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here:  
https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

videos.title: Drink 1 Cup of This Before Bed for a Smaller Waist
videos.summary_source_text:
Drink 1 Cup of This Before Bed for a Smaller Waist If you’re struggling with stubborn belly fat, your problem may not be calories; it may be cortisol.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4u2eFM6

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

When your stress hormone stays elevated at night, your body becomes more likely to store fat around your midsection. The worse your sleep gets, the harder it becomes for your body to burn visceral fat.

In this video, you’ll learn why drinking one cup of lemon balm tea before bed may help you calm your nervous system, improve deep sleep, lower nighttime cortisol, and support a smaller waistline naturally.

Dr. Eric Berg, DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

• Increase clubhead speed

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

videos.title: The NEW Taylormade 2027 Driver is...😳
videos.summary_source_text:
The NEW Taylormade 2027 Driver is...😳 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: UK | 26th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 26th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Colorado Avalanche Seasons Ends in a Fashion Nobody Saw Coming...Getting Swept
videos.summary_source_text:
The Colorado Avalanche Seasons Ends in a Fashion Nobody Saw Coming...Getting Swept Colorado Avalanche’s season ends by a stunning sweep by the Vegas Golden Knights. Can this Cup-caliber roster recover from such a shocking playoff collapse?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down how Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, and the Avalanche’s high-powered offense fell flat despite outshooting opponents and dominating regular season stats. Discussion highlights include the team’s struggles to generate quality chances, Vegas’ relentless defensive pressure, and lingering questions about coaching—will Jared Bednar remain behind the bench after a decade at the helm? The duo also spotlights upcoming offseason decisions for GM Chris MacFarland, the future of core players, and whether a rebuild—or a simple retool—is on the horizon.

videos.title: Hindi | 26th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 26th May, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Why early extension ruins contact #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why early extension ruins contact #golfswing #golftips Early extension makes it difficult to create space and return the club to the ball consistently. Practicing from slightly closer to the ball with a simple station encourages the hips to move back and stay out of the way. If you early extend from this setup, contact becomes almost impossible — which helps train the correct movement quickly.
If early extension or poor contact is holding your game back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear priorities and drills to build space and consistency in your swing.

videos.title: A Normal Stress Test Doesn’t Always Mean “Healthy”
videos.summary_source_text:
A Normal Stress Test Doesn’t Always Mean “Healthy” Heart disease often develops quietly over time, long before major symptoms ever appear. Many people assume testing will catch every problem early, but some tests are designed to detect only more advanced stages of blockage. That means plaque buildup can still be progressing even when blood flow appears normal. Waiting until disease becomes severe is very different from identifying risk early and taking action sooner.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. videos.title: Alex Smalley reflects on MAJOR breakthrough & results of Matt Every's U.S. Open qualifier | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Alex Smalley reflects on MAJOR breakthrough & results of Matt Every's U.S. Open qualifier | The Drop The Drop welcomes Alex Smalley to the show, as the PGA Championship runner-up prepares to make his return to action at this week’s Charles Schwab Challenge. He talks about how he preps for tournaments, his goals for the year and using his finish at the last major to propel his game forward. The next major on the schedule is the U.S. Open, and our co-host Matt Every played in a local qualifier to try and make his way into the national championship at Shinnecock. Our cameras were there to document his round. Someone who has already advanced to final qualifying is University of Virginia senior Ben James, who also sits atop the PGA TOUR University leaderboard and will turn pro imminently. But first, he and his teammates will try to succeed at this week’s NCAA Tournament finals. We visited campus to visit him and his team as their season winds down to its exciting finish.

videos.title: How Does He Stay On His Feet During This Move?
videos.summary_source_text:
How Does He Stay On His Feet During This Move? The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: DeepMind's CTO Explains Their Invisible "AI Watermark"
videos.summary_source_text:
DeepMind's CTO Explains Their Invisible "AI Watermark" Did you know your phone can easily tell you which videos or images or AI?

AI videos are getting so realistic to the point where it's bordering on scary. So I point blank asked the CTO of Google DeepMind at Google I/O this year: What is your company doing about this?

His answer was pretty cutting edge: Deepmind build a system called SynthID, an invisible digital watermark baked right into AI-generated content.

So if you’re ever watching a video and think, "Wait, is this real?", you can literally just use Circle to Search on your phone or drop the content into the Gemini app and ask, “Is this AI?”

It will instantly scan the invisible watermark and tell you the truth. 

Send this to someone who NEEDS to know about this (or tag that one friend who always falls for fake AI videos...)

videos.title: Därför stämmer inte 40-40-40 om din pension
videos.summary_source_text:
Därför stämmer inte 40-40-40 om din pension Många går och oroar sig för att bli fattigpensionärer, ofta på grund av rubriker som "40-40-40": att vi jobbar 40 timmar i veckan i 40 år för att leva på 40 procent av lönen. Jag pratade själv om det förr, men det stämmer inte för en vanlig löntagare.

Är du en snittsvensk med en lön kring snittet, som jobbar större delen av livet, kan du räkna med ungefär 60 till 70 procent av din slutlön i pension. Det beror på att över en femtedel av din lön redan sätts av automatiskt: den allmänna pensionen (inkomst- och premiepension) plus tjänstepensionen om du har kollektivavtal.

Min poäng är att de flesta inte behöver oroa sig. Extra sparande handlar om guldkant i vardagen som äldre, inte om överlevnad.

Mer om pension, tjänstepension och sparande finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

Jag pratade själv om det förr, men det stämmer inte för en vanlig löntagare.

Det beror på att över en femtedel av din lön redan sätts av automatiskt: den allmänna pensionen (inkomst- och premiepension) plus tjänstepensionen om du har kollektivavtal.

Min poäng är att de flesta inte behöver oroa sig. Extra sparande handlar om guldkant i vardagen som äldre, inte om överlevnad.

videos.title: Copy This Fleetwood Finish #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Copy This Fleetwood Finish #golfswing #golftips If your iron shots are inconsistent — thin one swing and fat the next — your arm connection and posture could be the reason. In this lesson, Dan was losing up to 4 inches of height and letting his arms splay out, creating a “chicken wing” and leading to poor contact. We used a simple drill to shorten his through swing and keep the arms closer and more extended — just like Tommy Fleetwood. The result? Better compression, a more stable posture, and pure strikes.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If your iron shots are inconsistent — thin one swing and fat the next — your arm connection and posture could be the reason. videos.title: How To Boost Hockey Instinct
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Boost Hockey Instinct When you watch McDavid or MacKinnon, it looks like magic which is exactly why most players never try to replicate it.
But it's not magic. It's mechanics. And mechanics can be broken down into learnable pieces, practiced until they're automatic, and turned into instinct.
That's the entire idea behind Train 2.0. My job is to break the movement down. Your job is to put in the reps. And because most of these pieces aren't being taught anywhere else, the work you put in now becomes your advantage on the ice.

videos.title: GPT 6 Explained: Release Date, Features & The AGI Questionn
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT 6 Explained: Release Date, Features & The AGI Questionn Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Every other day someone's screaming GPT-6 is dropping next month and it's basically AGI. So I dug into every credible source — OpenAI blogs, Sam Altman interviews, Stargate infrastructure data, the latest benchmarks — to figure out what's actually real. The answer is more interesting than the rumors.

In this video, I break down what's officially confirmed about GPT-6, what's credibly rumored, how it stacks up against GPT-5.5, the realistic release timeline, and the question everyone's asking: is GPT-6 going to be AGI? I give you a probability estimate with actual evidence — not hot takes.

🔔 Subscribe for no-hype AI breakdowns: [your channel link]

📌 CHAPTERS

00:00 The GPT-6 hype problem
01:27 What We Actually Know
02:30 The "Extra Goblins" Comment That Started It All
03:55 The Agentic Leap
05:01 The Real Reason We Can Guess at Timing — Stargate
06:26 GPT-6 vs GPT-5.5: The Honest Comparison
08:30 Who Actually Gets Hit by This
10:30 So Is GPT-6 AGI? Let's Define the Question
11:39 The Benchmark That Should End the Debate
13:17 So What's My Actual Probability Estimate?
14:35 The Punchline: Powerful, Not Magical
15:34 The Risks Nobody's Talking About Yet

🎯 KEY TAKEAWAYS

- GPT-6 has NOT been officially announced — latest shipped model is GPT-5.5 ("Spud"), released April 23, 2026
- Persistent memory + stronger agentic capabilities are the rumored headline features
- Realistic launch window: late 2026 to 2027, gated by Stargate buildout
- Training cost estimates: $10–20 billion (per Dario Amodei and other analysts)
- Probability GPT-6 qualifies as AGI: realistically 1–10%, centered around 5%

📊 SOURCES MENTIONED

- OpenAI Stargate announcement (July 2025)
- Sam Altman CMSWire interview (Dec 2025)
- TechRadar "extra goblins" analysis (April 2026)
- ARC-AGI-3 benchmark (March 2026)
- Yann LeCun commentary on LLM scaling
- McKinsey generative AI economic impact report

💬 QUESTION FOR YOU
What feature are you most excited or most skeptical about for GPT-6? Drop it in the comments — best ones shape future videos on this channel.

videos.title: Claude Mythos: The AI Anthropic Built — Then Locked Away
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Mythos: The AI Anthropic Built — Then Locked Away Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone is panicking about Claude Mythos — Anthropic's new top-tier model that's so capable they decided the public can't have it. But most of the takes flying around your timeline are from people who never opened the 244-page risk report. I did. And the real story is way more interesting than "scary AI."

In this video I break down what Claude Mythos actually is, why it's locked behind a program called Project Glasswing, what it can do that GPT-4o can't, and whether the AGI panic is justified or just more hype. We get into the emergent zero-day discovery capability that has cybersecurity researchers nervous, the 27-year-old OpenBSD bug Mythos found that nobody else caught, and the leaked Fortune report that forced Anthropic to go public weeks earlier than planned.

Whether you build with these models, write about them, or just want to understand where frontier AI is actually heading in 2026, this is the breakdown to watch.

⏱️ CHAPTERS

00:00 The Mythos panic everyone's getting wrong
01:07 The leak and the reveal
02:38 What Mythos can actually do
05:20 Why the public is locked out
08:24 Is this AGI? Mythos vs. GPT-4 and GPT-4o
10:55 Timeline of how we got here
12:31 What happens next

Fortune leak report (March 2026)

NBC News cybersecurity coverage

Gary Marcus commentary

videos.title: The new Ferrari Luce: My HONEST take...
videos.summary_source_text:
The new Ferrari Luce: My HONEST take... This is the Ferrari Luce, Ferrari’s very first all-electric car - and it might be the most controversial car of the decade! 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://shorturl.at/M75mL

It’s not the first time Ferrari has looked to use electrical power in its cars. The likes of the SF90 and 296 are some of the most popular Ferraris around. But this is the very first all-electric car to roll off the production line at Maranello - and the reception has been… Interesting! 

So what’s all the fuss about? Let’s take a closer look.

In terms of the design, there’s one BIG factor in why people aren’t happy with the looks - and that’s because it wasn’t even designed by Ferrari! It was designed by LoveFrom, a creative collective headed up by ex-Apple designer Sir Jony Ive, and it seems their end product has proven especially divisive. There are ‘floating’ front and rear spoilers, rear-hinged doors for the back seat passengers, and it comes in as Ferrari’s largest car to date - over 5m long! All in all, we worry that it looks more like an indistinguishable Chinese EV, rather than a car worth a £400,000+ price tag! 

Thankfully, there’s a lot to like about the interior. Despite being an EV, physical dials and buttons have been retained. There’s a large, movable infotainment screen in the centre of the dash, but otherwise it’s kept relatively minimalist and clean - unlike most modern cars with fussy, complicated interiors. What’s more, it’s also the second Ferrari to come with 4 doors, and the first to come with a bench seat for 5 passengers in the rear! 

In terms of performance, the Luce is an absolute powerhouse. It comes with four electric motors, and these combine to propel you to 60mph in just 2.5 seconds. It has a top speed of 193mph, and it produces an eye-watering 1,050hp! However, despite its huge size, it’s not the heaviest EV out there, tipping the scales at 2,260kg. That’s 400kg lighter than a BMW iX M70! 

So what do you think - is it worth the huge £474,000 price tag?! And more importantly, do you think Ferrari will actually manage to sell any other?! Let us know in the comments! videos.title: How to Put Like a Pro | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Put Like a Pro | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the fifth Paddy’s Golf Tip is on putting, which is in two parts. 
 
In the first instalment,  I explain the basic fundamentals of putting, covering the set up and the stroke. I demonstrate both aspects and explain why a short follow through encourages you to rap your putts.

I also explain why it is important to train your eyes to watch your putts and also provide a cure for the dreaded yips!

#PadraigHarrington #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback #putting

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

About Padraig Harrington: 

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. As a three time major champion, Padraig is one of the world’s top golfers and his playing record speaks for itself. Following a very successful amateur career, including winning the Walker Cup in 1995 at Royal Porthcawl in one of his three appearances, he turned professional in September 1995.

videos.title: I Found The Secret To Straight Drives
videos.summary_source_text:
I Found The Secret To Straight Drives Have you been struggling to hit the driver as straight and long as you want? In this video, I’m sharing the ultimate driver takeaway secret that I’ve given to my students for years, but recently started using myself to hit straight drives and control my club path.

If you are an everyday golfer who struggles with an inside takeaway, casting, or a wild club face, this simple golf swing visual cue will completely change your game. By using your toe line to marry up your hand line, you can fix your backswing theme and master your downswing delivery. Stop wasting distance with massive curvature—learn how to get your club path to zero for pure, straight tee shots every single time!

Chapters:
00:00 - The Driver Secret I've Kept From Myself
00:43 - Why Amateur Takeaways Fail (The Matchup Trap)
01:21 - How Club Path Controls Distance and Curvature
01:45 - The Perfect Setup: Checking Your Hand Distance
02:37 - The Toe Line Trick: Locking In Your Takeaway
03:31 - How to Use the Toe Line on Your Downswing
04:14 - Putting the Feel Into a Real Shot (Zero Path)

videos.title: OVETIME THRILLER! Andrei Svechnikov's OT Heroics Gives the Carolina Hurricanes a 2-1 Series Lead!
videos.summary_source_text:
OVETIME THRILLER! Andrei Svechnikov's OT Heroics Gives the Carolina Hurricanes a 2-1 Series Lead! The Carolina Hurricanes take a 2-1 series lead after winning ANOTHER game 3-2 in overtime. This time, it was Andrei Svechnikov with the overtime heroics for his second goal of the playoffs. What stood out in a wild Game 3 that saw goals taken off the board and multiple questionable penalty calls and non-calls? Also, how does this win give the Hurricanes all the momentum in the series heading into Wednesday night's Game 4? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 3 overtime win, their second consecutive 3-2 win in bonus hockey, and their fifth such win this postseason. What about winning 3-2 in overtime is the Hurricanes' mo to get the wins? How clutch was Svechnikov in the win? Secondly, what else stood out in the win? How big was it to get goals by Shayne Gostisbehere and Taylor Hall to give the Hurricanes their goals by committee when they needed it the most? Finally, Zach concludes the show by giving his thoughts on how this game gives the Hurricanes all the confidence to head into Game 4 with a chance to take a 3-1 series lead. With them having their first Eastern Conference Final lead since 2006, is there some mojo cooking for the Hurricanes, finally, in the Rod Brind'Amour era in the ECF? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Is This The Best Golf Resort in The World!? In this video Rick Shiels is in Florida, USA at Streamsong. Could this be one of the best golf resorts on the planet? 

Thanks to Streamsong for hosting me: https://www.streamsongresort.com

Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. In this video Rick Shiels is in Florida, USA at Streamsong. Could this be one of the best golf resorts on the planet?
